attributes and these users can be clustered in any way shape or form it can be b2b, b2c or what I call b2p because really there's no such thing as b2b or b2c it's just business to people and then the you look at where their current situation is and you look at where their desired situation is and you didn't make those up you actually went to the niche and asked them and now you design an offer
